storyboard.content: I have a dull ache in my right knee that is getting worse over time
My knee feels stiff in the morning and it takes a while to loosen up
I hear a clicking sound when I bend my knee
This has been gradually getting worse over the past 6 months
The pain is moderate, around 5 to 6 out of 10, and it is interfering with my tennis games and daily tasks
The pain is worst going up stairs, getting up after sitting, and after my weekly tennis games, but ice helps temporarily
I am a 58-year-old woman who plays tennis regularly each week
